inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $2.58B less capital spending $155M, divided by 622.8M diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-26)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses cash from operations minus capital spending; excludes bitcoin mark-to-market in net income and non-cash stock compensation add-backs in Adjusted EBITDA

bear.notes: Square GPV slows; Cash App ex-bitcoin growth decelerates; credit losses rise on BNPL book

base.notes: Square GPV +10% FY25; Cash App ex-bitcoin net revenue +20% FY25 and +37% Q1-26; gross profit +27% Q1-26

bull.notes: Cash App banking and Afterpay cross-sell accelerate; Square international and vertical software mix improves

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Fintech platform; bitcoin held at fair value on balance sheet per 10-K

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Bitcoin ecosystem revenue is large but low-margin; 2-4% of consolidated gross profit Q1-26 (10-Q)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate bitcoin treasury ~8,500 BTC marked to market; FY2025 remeasurement loss $55.9M (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal or trust recovery

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Afterpay BNPL, Cash App Card, and Square banking embedded in segment revenue paths (10-K segment note)

human_review.notes: First Marvin deep dive 2026-07-09; confirm live price and consumer-credit reserve trends on next 10-Q.

segments.label: Cash App (consumer)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: 62% of consolidated owner cash allocated by FY2025 segment gross profit share ($6.34B of $10.27B)
segments.notes: Ex-bitcoin net revenue +20% FY25; gross profit +21% FY25 and +38% Q1-26

segments.label: Square (seller)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: 38% of consolidated owner cash allocated by FY2025 segment gross profit share ($3.94B of $10.27B)
segments.notes: Square GPV $250B+ FY25; revenue +10% FY25; Q1 GPV +13%

options.label: Corporate bitcoin treasury (~8,500 BTC)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Marked to market on balance sheet; no separate terminal in Lawrence base; bull sensitivity only
options.evidence: 10-K bitcoin investment table; FY2025 remeasurement loss $55.9M

options.label: Bitcoin ecosystem revenue (low-margin)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Revenue in Cash App segment; only 2-4% of consolidated gross profit
options.evidence: 10-Q Q1-26: bitcoin ecosystem 2% of total gross profit

corporate_drag.notes: Corporate and other gross profit $89M FY25; unallocated G&A and stock compensation above segment gross profit

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 OCF $2.58B less capex $155M on 622.8M diluted shares

blended_best.notes: Filings only; no approved third-party blend

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
